document_pack.title: North Texas hail claim dispute involving Allstate Texas Lloyds
document_pack.why_it_matters: Shows recurring disagreement themes around scope, matching, and wear-and-tear defenses after hail events.

common_defenses: Late notice / failure to mitigate defense
rebuttal_angles: Key fact undermines carrier position: Golf-ball-size hail was reported in Tarrant County on the reported date of loss.
Key fact undermines carrier position: Roof slope bruising and soft-metal damage were documented shortly after the storm.
Counter matching defense: contemporaneous storm reports align with the claimed hail damage window.
